//static const float BeamCurveBase = pow( smoothstep( -1.0, 1.0, sin( q24 / 1.0 ) ), 2.0 ) * 1.0;
//calc xtime first, cause at certain xtimes, if beam is curved more than 0.5, z has to be changed
zAng = if( fixZforCurve, zAngFixHigh + zAngFixLow, zAng );
zAngS = sin( zAng ); zAngC = cos( zAng );
q1 = x1a; q2 = y1a; q3 = z1a;
q5 = x2a; q6 = y2a; q7 = z2a;
xAngS = sin( xAng ); xAngC = cos( xAng );
q5 = x2a; q6 = y2a; q7 = z2a;
//q17 = w1a; q18 = w2a; q19 = w3a;//view pos - redundate, get from q4/8/12
btimeAdd = if( swipeRange, 1.0/fps * volAddDampered * 0.3 * volAdj, btimeAdd );
freeze = if( above( mid+treb, avgMidTreb * 3.0 ) * below( freeze, 0.05 ), 1.0, freeze );
q21 = botMove; q23 = max( min( botBaseTime * 8.0 - 6.0, 1.0), 0.0 );
